link_ids.description: Explicit list of link_ids to acknowledge.

target_doc_id.description: Acknowledge all pending links for this target document (bulk).

include_explain.description: Attach explain object to each link (strategy + notes). Default false (no-op).

preserve_accepted.description: When replace_existing=true, keep links with status='accepted' and treat them as protected anchors.

relation_type.description: Stored in run params for traceability. Not yet applied functionally to alignment_links — tracked as known drift (ADR-009, v1.4.1).

replace_existing.description: If true, remove previous links for the pivot/target scope before creating a new alignment run.

orphan_docs.description: Children whose parent doc is absent from the corpus

unaligned_pairs.description: Segmented pairs with no alignment links

unsegmented_children.description: Children (or their parents) with 0 line units

out_dir.description: Optional destination directory. Default: DB directory. Mutually exclusive with out_path.

out_path.description: Exact destination file path (e.g. /path/to/corpus.db). Mutually exclusive with out_dir. Returns 409 if file exists.

preview_only.description: Return pairs as JSON without writing a file

include_structure.description: Emit <head> elements for structure units in addition to body units.

relation_type.description: Relation filter for TEI listRelation (none disables relation export).

family_id.description: Export all parent↔child pairs in one TMX

skip_unready.description: Skip pairs where child is not segmented (vs. error)

family_root_doc_id.description: If provided, a 'translation_of' relation is created from the newly imported document to this parent document id.

relation_created.description: True when a translation_of relation was inserted.

relation_id.description: Id of the doc_relations row (new or pre-existing).

incremental.description: If true, runs incremental FTS sync (insert/refresh/prune) instead of full rebuild.

db_paths.description: Optional absolute/relative database paths for federated multi-DB query.

family_id.description: When set, expands the query to all docs in the family (parent + children) and forces include_aligned=true.

pivot_only.description: When family_id is set, restrict the search to the pivot (parent) document only.

calibrate_to.description: doc_id of reference document; adds a ratio warning if segment counts differ by > 15 %

source_unit_n.description: n of the original unit this segment was produced from

calibrate_to.description: doc_id of reference document; adds a ratio warning if segment counts differ by > 15 %

aligned.description: Partner units from alignment_links (only present when include_aligned=true).

include_aligned.description: When true, each hit gains an `aligned` list with partner units from alignment_links.

n2.description: n of the second (deleted) unit; must be n1+1

text_b.description: Text for the new unit inserted at unit_n+1

info.description: Localhost HTTP API for persistent corpus operations (query/index/import/etc.).
info.title: multicorpus_engine sidecar API

Delete a convention role; assigned units become NULL (token required)

Export alignment links as CSV/TSV

Export token_query hits to CSV/TSV

Rebuild FTS index
